headline: 150,000+ Form 4 Filings Per Year. Most Investors See Them Late.
body: The SEC publishes insider trading disclosures on EDGAR within hours of the transaction. The data is public. The volume is unmanageable. And 80% of filings are routine noise. The 20% that represent genuine conviction buying are buried in the same feed.
ctaHeadline: The Data Is Public. The Speed Is Not.
